task_completion.description: Load the three regional GeoJSON files into QGIS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGIS Layers panel shows 'europe_countries', 'africa_countries', and 'south_america_countries' loaded.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Merge vector layers' tool in QGIS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Merge Vector Layers' dialog box is open on the screen (usually accessed via Vector > Data Management Tools > Merge Vector Layers).

task_completion.description: Select all three regional layers as inputs for the merge operation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Merge Vector Layers' dialog, the 'Input layers' field indicates that 3 inputs are selected, or a multi-select dropdown shows the three specific regional layers checked.

task_completion.description: Set the Destination CRS to EPSG:4326 (WGS 84).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Merge Vector Layers' dialog, the 'Destination CRS' field is explicitly set to 'EPSG:4326' or 'WGS 84'.

task_completion.description: Set the output file path to the specified exports directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Merge Vector Layers' dialog, the 'Merged' output field shows the path '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/merged_countries.geojson' instead of a temporary file.

task_completion.description: Execute the merge tool and display the combined result.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new merged layer appears in the QGIS Layers panel, and the map canvas displays the combined geometries of Europe, Africa, and South America.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGIS graphical user interface to perform the merge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QGIS application window and its dialog boxes, rather than just terminal windows.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass QGIS by using command-line GIS tools like ogr2ogr.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing 'ogr2ogr' or similar command-line GDAL/OGR utilities to perform the merge.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the QGIS merge tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGIS log or progress bar shows the 'Merge vector layers' algorithm executing or completing successfully.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires merging three specific files (europe_countries.geojson, africa_countries.geojson, south_america_countries.geojson) located in /home/ga/GIS_Data/regions/. The expected output must be saved exactly to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/merged_countries.geojson. The Destination CRS must be EPSG:4326 (WGS 84). A successful merge will result in a single layer containing exactly 103 features (39 Europe + 51 Africa + 13 South America) with 'NAME' and 'CONTINENT' attributes preserved.
